pattern: Each term is produced by run-length encoding the previous term: scan it into maximal runs of one digit and emit the run length followed by that digit.
hints: The sequence is defined recursively; term n is built only from term n-1, and the very first term is the single character "1".
To advance one step, walk the current string grouping consecutive equal digits into maximal runs.
For each run append its length as a digit string then the digit itself, and repeat this transformation n-1 times starting from "1".

edge_inputs.description: base term is the single digit one
fourth term introduces two distinct runs
fifth term has a run of three

stress.description: every valid n exercised deterministically over the small fixed domain
stress.note: domain is tiny; optimal and oracle must agree on each term up to the cap
